task: Define scheduler and worker process contract
acceptance_criteria: Run-once and loop semantics are explicit and testable
notes: Added explicit process settings, oneshot/loop semantics, and unit-level process contract coverage

acceptance_criteria: Scheduler can dispatch on an interval and expose dispatch outcome
notes: Scheduler main now emits JSON cycle results and can run oneshot or bounded loop mode

acceptance_criteria: Worker can poll queue, surface idle and failed cycles, and write metrics
notes: Worker main now emits JSON cycle results, exits non-zero on failed cycle, and supports explicit loop control

acceptance_criteria: Process tests, background process gate, and existing live metrics gate pass together
validation_command: uv run pytest tests/operations/processes && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-background-processes.ps1 && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ./scripts/test-metrics-pipeline-live.ps1
notes: Process tests, Ruff, Mypy, background Redis/Postgres process gate, and metrics live gate all passed
